title: ITSM Process Manager – Incident, Request, Problem & Knowledge Management

summary.lv: Posti Messaging SIA meklē ITSM Process Manager incidentu, pieprasījumu, problēmu un zināšanu pārvaldībai SIAM organizācijā. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €2500–3000 mēnesī.
summary.en: Posti Messaging SIA seeks an ITSM Process Manager for Incident, Request, Problem & Knowledge Management within a SIAM organisation to strengthen service quality and operational excellence, offering €2,500–3,000/month.
